name: agency.self/teamdynamix-mcp
description: A production-ready TypeScript MCP server for TeamDynamix ITSM, providing tools for tickets, knowledge base, assets, configuration items, services, projects, people, and more.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: The base URL of your TeamDynamix instance (e.g., https://your-tenant.teamdynamix.com/TDWebApi). Must use HTTPS.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode: 'standard' for username/password, or 'admin' for BEID/web services key.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Username for standard authentication mode. Required when TEAMDYNAMIX_AUTH_MODE is 'standard'.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password for standard authentication mode. Required when TEAMDYNAMIX_AUTH_MODE is 'standard'.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_BEID
environmentVariables.description: BEID for admin authentication mode. Required when TEAMDYNAMIX_AUTH_MODE is 'admin'.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_WEB_SERVICES_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Web services key for admin authentication mode. Required when TEAMDYNAMIX_AUTH_MODE is 'admin'.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_DEFAULT_TICKET_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default application ID for ticket operations. Used when app_id parameter is omitted.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_DEFAULT_ASSET_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default application ID for asset operations. Used when app_id parameter is omitted.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_DEFAULT_KB_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default application ID for knowledge base operations. Used when app_id parameter is omitted.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds. Default: 30000 (30 seconds).

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_MAX_RETRIES
environmentVariables.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient failures. Default: 2.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_ENABLE_WRITE_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Enables write/mutation tools (create, update, comment). Default: false. Set to 'true' to enable.

environmentVariables.name: TEAMDYNAMIX_ENABLE_ADMIN_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Enables administrative operations. Default: false. Set to 'true' to enable.
